items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI

items.title: Lucid blames dip in Q1 sales on seat supplier issue
items.description: Lucid said it has resolved the problem and is not changing its guidance for 2026.

items.title: The anonymous social app that thinks it can work in Saudi Arabia
items.description: When Fizz quietly debuted in Saudi Arabia, founder and CEO Teddy Solomon wasn’t expecting the app to catch on like it did.

items.title: Tesla’s Texas factory workforce reportedly shrunk 22% in 2025
items.description: Tesla's headcount fell from 21,191 workers to 16,506 workers in 2025, according to a report, as it grappled with its second straight year of declining sales.

items.title: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
items.description: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

items.title: Anthropic buys biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: Reports
items.description: Anthropic has purchased the stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to The Information and Eric Newcomer.

items.title: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
items.description: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.

items.title: Best iPad apps to boost productivity and make your life easier
items.description: There are many iPad apps to help you organize recipes, sync tasks across devices, be more productive, and manage your notes.

items.title: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers. What could go wrong?
items.description: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are all betting big on new natural gas power plants to run their AI data centers. They may regret it.

items.title: People would rather have an Amazon warehouse in their backyard than a data center
items.description: A new poll shows that the debate over data centers is far from settled.

items.title: The final days of the Tesla Model X and S are here. All bets are on the Cybercab.
items.description: It's a new era for Tesla — and one that will rely on its ability to launch the Cybercab and mass-produce the Optimus robot.

items.title: Europe’s cyber agency blames hacking gangs for massive data breach and leak
items.description: CERT-EU blamed the cybercrime group TeamPCP for the recent hack on the European Commission, and said the notorious ShinyHunters gang was responsible for leaking the stolen data online.

items.title: The Facebook insider building content moderation for the AI era
items.description: Moonbounce has raised $12 million to grow its AI control engine that converts content moderation policies into consistent, predictable AI behavior.

items.title: Amazon hits sellers with ‘fuel surcharge’ as Iran war roils global energy markets
items.description: The e-commerce giant called the surcharge "temporary" but couldn't give a date for when the policy would be retired.

items.title: Telehealth giant Hims & Hers says its customer support system was hacked
items.description: The U.S. telehealth giant says hackers stole customer support ticket data over the course of several days in February.
